full_text:
Zheng Sui 鄭遂
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zheng Sui (鄭遂)was born in Runan. Student of Li Gu, compiled record of master’s sayings. Killed by Turbans from Qing. Zheng Sui was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Zheng Sui lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
